page_metadata.biotools__summary: BoaG is a language and an infrastructure for deeper analysis of the public genomics databases. The BoaG database is a domain-specific language and shared data science infrastructure for genomics, along with a CD-HIT clustering of all these protein sequences at different sequence similarity levels.
